scripts.setup: uv venv --python 3.12 .venv && uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python -r requirements.txt
scripts.train:production: PYTORCH_ENABLE_MPS_FALLBACK=1 PYTORCH_MPS_HIGH_WATERMARK_RATIO=1.2 PYTORCH_MPS_LOW_WATERMARK_RATIO=1.0 .venv/bin/python train_plant_disease.py --preset full --model-name efficientnet_b1 --epochs 15 --batch-size 64 --num-workers 4 --out-dir outputs_production_b1_15ep
scripts.train:b3: PYTORCH_ENABLE_MPS_FALLBACK=1 PYTORCH_MPS_HIGH_WATERMARK_RATIO=1.2 PYTORCH_MPS_LOW_WATERMARK_RATIO=1.0 .venv/bin/python train_plant_disease.py --preset full --model-name efficientnet_b3 --epochs 15 --batch-size 32 --num-workers 4 --out-dir outputs_production_b3_15ep
